creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
I plan to discontinue the port, and suggest that users migrate to the
TokyoCabinet-based version (see the bogofilter-tc sibling port).

NOTE: before deinstalling -qdbm, all databases should be dumped with bogoutil,
to be reloaded after installing -tc.

TokyoCabinet is QDBM's successor, written by QDBM's author.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
